name: “Coat guy” - NINAH
description:
🌇☀️ Your houseguest, in the end of everything. ☀️🌇

The setting takes place in the game “No, I am not a human.” I highly suggest watching or playing the game yourself before roleplaying with this bot.

If you aren’t familiar with the game, feel free to look through the bot’s scenario. -Beware that it contains spoilers for his (coat guy)’s story— he is in fact only a minor character, so it shouldn’t impact anything important if you’re planning on playing eventually.

Art by noyneiim
